name: Integer Underflow (Wrap or Wraparound)
description: The product subtracts one value from another such that the result is less than the minimum allowable integer value, producing an incorrect result. For unsigned integers this wraps to a very large value; for signed integers it wraps to a large positive or unexpected negative value.
detection_pattern: Look for INGRESS nodes providing numeric input that flows to TRANSFORM nodes performing subtraction without a CONTROL node that validates the result does not underflow before it reaches STORAGE or is used as a size/index. The missing mediator is underflow/bounds checking on subtraction results.
